# komodo_variable (Resource)

Manages a Komodo variable.

## Example Usage

```terraform
resource "komodo_variable" "example" {
  name  = "MY_VARIABLE"
  value = "my-value"
}

resource "komodo_variable" "secret" {
  name           = "MY_SECRET"
  value          = var.my_secret
  secret_enabled = true
}
```

<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `name` (String) The variable name.

### Optional

- `description` (String) The variable description.
- `secret_enabled` (Boolean) Whether the variable is secret.
- `value` (String) The variable value.

### Read-Only

- `id` (String) The variable identifier (same as name).

## Import

Import is supported using the following syntax:

The [`terraform import` command](https://developer.hashicorp.com/terraform/cli/commands/import) can be used, for example:

```shell
terraform import komodo_variable.example MY_VARIABLE
```
